login.title: Admin Login
login.subtitle: Sign in to access the admin dashboard
login.notConfigured: Admin login is not configured on the server. Set ADMIN_PASSWORD or ADMIN_SESSION_SECRET (16+ chars) in .env.
login.serverError: Could not reach the server. Try again.

dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your real estate properties and leads

pages.title: Page Content
pages.comingSoon: Page content management is coming soon...

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage admin access and team members.
settings.emailExists: User with this email already exists.
settings.lastUserError: Cannot delete the last admin user.

errors.cannot_deactivate_last_super_admin: At least one active Super Admin is required. Promote another member or add one before deactivating this account.
errors.cannot_remove_last_super_admin: At least one active Super Admin is required. Assign the Super Admin role to another member before changing this one.
errors.cannot_deactivate_self: You cannot deactivate your own account while signed in.
errors.cannot_delete_self: You cannot delete your own account.
errors.cannot_delete_last_super_admin: Cannot remove the last active Super Admin.
errors.cannot_delete_last_user: Cannot remove the last admin user.
errors.user_already_activated: This member has already accepted the invite.
errors.email_already_exists: A user with this email already exists.
errors.invalid_payload: Invalid request. Check the fields and try again.

settings.removeInviteConfirm: Remove pending invite for {{email}}? The invite link will stop working.
settings.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate {{email}}? They will not be able to sign in.
settings.resetPasswordConfirm: Generate a new temporary password for {{email}}?
settings.resetPasswordHint: Copy this password and send it to the user securely. It will not be shown again.
settings.forbidden: You do not have permission to manage team members.
settings.inviteHelp: Enter email and role. The teammate receives an invite link to set their own password.
settings.inviteSentBody: An email was sent to {{email}} with a link to activate the account.
settings.inviteLinkBody: Email is not configured on the server. Send this link to {{email}} manually:
settings.descriptionExtended: Team access, shared media library, and third-party integrations.

media.title: Media & Drive
media.description: Central library for brochures, presentations, and shared files. Attach items to properties without re-uploading.
media.deleteConfirm: Delete this file from the library?
media.canEdit: You can upload and manage files here.
media.permissionsHelp: View: browse and download. Edit: upload and delete files.
media.storageLimitExceeded: Storage limit reached. Remove old files or increase MEDIA_STORAGE_LIMIT_GB.

invite.title: Activate your admin account
invite.invalidToken: This invite link is invalid or has expired.
invite.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
invite.acceptFailed: Could not set password. The link may have expired.
invite.success: Your password is set. You can sign in now.

integrations.title: Integrations & API keys
integrations.description: Connect CRM, WhatsApp, SMS alerts for new leads, property parsers, and other services. Values are stored encrypted in the database; .env is used as fallback.
integrations.noChanges: Enter a new value in at least one field to save.
integrations.saveHint: Leave a field empty to keep the current value. Clear a field and save to remove the stored key.

crm_api_url.label: CRM API URL
crm_api_url.description: Base URL of your CRM REST API (HubSpot, amoCRM, custom).

crm_api_key.label: CRM API key
crm_api_key.description: Private API key or bearer token for CRM sync.

whatsapp_bot_token.label: WhatsApp Bot token
whatsapp_bot_token.description: Meta Cloud API permanent token for the business WhatsApp bot.

whatsapp_phone_number_id.label: WhatsApp Phone number ID
whatsapp_phone_number_id.description: Phone number ID from Meta Business Manager (optional).

sms_gateway_url.label: SMS gateway URL
sms_gateway_url.description: HTTP endpoint of your SMS provider for lead alerts.

sms_gateway_api_key.label: SMS gateway API key
sms_gateway_api_key.description: API key for sending SMS when a new lead arrives.

sms_lead_notify_enabled.label: SMS on new lead
sms_lead_notify_enabled.description: Set to true or 1 to enable SMS notifications for new inquiries.

property_parser_api_url.label: Parser API URL
property_parser_api_url.description: Endpoint of your property listing parser or feed importer.

property_parser_api_key.label: Parser API key
property_parser_api_key.description: Authentication key for the parser service.

gemini_api_key.label: Gemini API key
gemini_api_key.description: Google AI Studio key for admin auto-translation of listings.

resend_api_key.label: Resend API key
resend_api_key.description: Resend.com key for team invite emails.

email_from.label: Email From address
email_from.description: Sender for transactional email, e.g. SGIP <noreply@yourdomain.com>.

form.title: Title
form.clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag and drop
form.imageInfo: PNG, JPG, GIF up to 10MB each

folderImport.title: New listing from a folder
folderImport.intro: Browser only: pick a folder and the listing is created for you. No terminal or server setup.
folderImport.step1: You are here: Properties → folder import.
folderImport.step3: In the file picker, choose the folder that contains the photos/files for one (or more) listings, then confirm.
folderImport.step4: Wait until it finishes: first the upload bar, then a short “creating listing” step. Keep this tab open.
folderImport.step5: Done — the new listing appears in the table above.
folderImport.dropHint: Click here and choose a folder
folderImport.dropSub: Put photos (and optional documents) inside the folder. One folder can be one listing, or several subfolders for several listings.
folderImport.phaseUploadHelp: Large photos and a slow connection are normal; watch the progress bar and do not close the tab.
folderImport.phaseProcessHelp: The server is processing files; this is usually faster than the upload.
folderImport.advancedHint: If drag n drop did not work, choose the property folder.
folderImport.tooLarge: Files exceed the server limit. Split the folder or ask an administrator.
folderImport.totalSizeExceeded: Total file size ({{sizeInGB}}GB) exceeds the maximum limit (10GB). Try uploading folders separately.
folderImport.uploadNoPath: Server did not return a path after upload. Try again.
folderImport.pathRequired: Enter a folder path or use Browse.
folderImport.networkError: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
folderImport.dbSchemaMismatch: Server database schema is outdated for import. Ask administrator to run migrations, then retry.
folderImport.importHtmlError: Import was interrupted or took too long. Try again or use a smaller folder.
folderImport.deleteFolderConfirm: Delete folder "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
folderImport.deleteFileConfirm: Delete file "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
folderImport.deleteFolderDataConfirm: Also delete linked property data (listing + media files) for "{{name}}"?
